# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# robots.txt — Southern Tales | https://www.southerntales.in
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── Allow all search engines to crawl the full public site ───────────────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# ── Public pages (explicitly allowed) ────────────────────────────────────────
Allow: /menu
Allow: /about
Allow: /gallery
Allow: /reservation
Allow: /contactus

# ── Block private / admin / auth routes from being indexed ───────────────────
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /otp-verification
Disallow: /live-orders
Disallow: /order-summary

# ── Block Vite build assets (not useful for crawlers) ────────────────────────
Disallow: /assets/

# ── Block API endpoints ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Disallow: /api/

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Googlebot — same rules, explicit entry for clarity
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /assets/

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Bingbot
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /assets/

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Block bad / aggressive bots
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Sitemap location
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Sitemap: https://www.southerntales.in/sitemap.xml
